violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Ambient temperature of prep unit #1 cold drawers was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Pasta in this unit observed to have a temperature of 46 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods had been placed in this unit 2 hours prior to inspection and were moved to the walk-in cooler. Service call placed. No TCS foods are to be stored in the left side of this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Working container of a dry ingredient observed not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets of prep unit #1 lowboy door and the dessert reach-in were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Cutting boards observed to be very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Ceiling tile is missing above the prep unit/cook/grill line. Ceiling tile must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

The cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

1-door freezer reach-in located on the cook/grill line was not in good repair. Tape observed on the handle. Handle must be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024
